productDisplayName: Nike Men Manu Show Time Black Jacket
description: CompositionBlack track jacket made of 53% polyester and 47% cotton, with ribbed neck, cuffs and hem, side-zip pockets, applique club badge on left chest, embroidered swoosh logo on right chest and manchester united print on the centre back in red, and synthetic tape stitched along shoulder and sleevesFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softenersDo not bleachCool ironTumble dry on lowDo not iron on designDo not dry cleanCheer for the football club that's unlike any other in this Manchester United Football Club Track Jacket from nike. With retro styling and club symbols, this jacket delivers the insulation you need on or off the pitch. Team this with jeans and nike shoes for a cool casual look.
